description: A wide daytime photograph of the facade of the Frances Perkins Department of Labor Building in Washington, D.C. under a blue sky with scattered clouds. Two large banners hang on the building. Flanking a large vertical American flag in the center, the left banner is navy-blue with a portrait of President Trump, a small 'AMERICA 250' mark, and large white serif text reading 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST'; the right banner is a maroon and sepia-toned portrait of former President Theodore Roosevelt with the matching 'AMERICA 250' mark and 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST' text. Small figures of people are visible on the roofline. The building's engraved name 'FRANCES PERKINS DEPARTMENT OF LABOR BUILDING' is faintly visible above the entrance.
notable_text: AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST. AMERICA 250. (Trump banner, left; Theodore Roosevelt banner, right.)
